docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-23-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COMEAUX, JACQUELINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KARPOVA, ANNA $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,650.00, IGOR RUCHKA IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER THE PLAINTIFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF COMEAUX, JACQUELINE
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL APPROVED*** PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2026 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO APR-23-2026 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-03-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $75.00 AS TO DEFENDANT KARPOVA, ANNA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-23-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-23-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. PLAINTIFF JACQUELINE COMEAUX IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANNA KAARPOVA IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT IGOR RUCHKA NOT APPEARING. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AS TO IGOR RUCHKA. PLAINTIFF REQUESTES TO DISMISS DEFENDANT IGOR RUCHKA WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY COMEAUX, JACQUELINE AS TO DEFENDANT KARPOVA, ANNA RUCHKA, IGOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
